summary: Fix iCloud calendar sync, dashboard layout, and meeting alerts with join links.

introduced: Meeting reminder popup 2 minutes before start on any workspace, with Join meeting link and Funky alert sound distinct from email
Overlapping meetings at the same time show in one alert with highlighted invite email per calendar so you can pick the right link
changed: Dashboard layout: Calendar schedule on the left, Apple Music above Nucleus AI on the right, scrollable event list
Meeting reminders fire once at 2 minutes before start (replaces 10‑min / 1‑min / at‑start alerts)
fixed: iCloud SwiftDataError on launch — CalendarEventRecord made CloudKit-compatible with one-time local store reset for calendar schema
updated: CloudKit error messages mention CD_CalendarEventRecord when Production schema is missing
